creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 174297
3.015

Hi Jun,

The attached patch updates the p5-Sereal ports to 3.015.

The Changes here are:
  * Fix builds under 5.25+
  * Fix various buffer overun bugs found using AFL (thanks to dgryski)
  * Fix issue in decode_from_file()


-----------------
-----------------
And, Jun, let's talk about maintainership.

Correct me if I'm wrong, but you don't seem particularly interested in the p5-Sereal ports. No commits for nearly 2 years, and all the update work has been done by me and committed under timeouts.

I'm ready and willing to take maintainership of these ports. On every other update I've sent you a total of 6 (SIX) direct emails reiterating this same information and asking for input. Those letters have always gone ignored.

At the end of time out here, I will reassign p5-Sereal* to myself as part of the update, unless you initiate a dialogue with me and we come up with a different plan together.
